prd.oneLiner: Connect project structure, work and milestones, owners, status, dependencies, issues, and operations reporting.
prd.goal: Reduce project-status reporting preparation by 40% and identify milestone delays earlier.
prd.whyNow: Work, schedules, decisions, and risks are spread across tools, so teams do not share priority or progress consistently.
prd.problem: Work, schedules, decisions, and risks are spread across tools, so teams do not share priority or progress consistently.
prd.solution: Connect project structure, work and milestones, owners, status, dependencies, issues, and operations reporting.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Project team member
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Work, schedules, decisions, and risks are spread across tools, so teams do not share priority or progress consistently.

targets.name: Project manager and PMO
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Work, schedules, decisions, and risks are spread across tools, so teams do not share priority or progress consistently.

scenarios.text: Project team member completes project and work-item creation and checks progress.
Project manager and PMO reviews schedule, risk, and completion reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Reduce project-status reporting preparation by 40% and identify milestone delays earlier.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Assignment, schedule change, and issue handling
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
